NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT GRANTS DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL. THE TRIAL DATE OF 4/12/21 IS CONTINUED TO 11/8/21 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206. ALL PRETRIAL DEADLINES, DISCOVERY AND MOTION PRACTICE INCLUDING 2034 CCP EXPERT DISCOVERY SHALL BE GOVERNED BY THE NEW TRIAL DATE. COUNSEL FOR DEFENDANT WHO IS THE MOVING PARTY SHALL PREPARE A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER THAT IS APPROVED AS TO FORM, THEN SUBMIT IT TO DEPT. 206. NOTICE WAIVED. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
